title: chrysosplenium flaviflorum
intro: Chrysosplenium flaviflorum, also known as yellow spleenwort or yellow chrysosplenium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Saxifragaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Chrysosplenium flaviflorum include its potential to aid in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions, as well as its ability to support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a decoction or infusion for use in herbal remedies, and its leaves and stems are often dried and used in teas or tinctures.
